config.title: Karta problemu #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'CCardBuilder #include "50131" 'GetMenu #include "50506" 'section_* #include "50222" 'std_openform_field_hli #include "50610" 'fire_choicelist #include "50200"
'enum2str #include "50131"
'messageBox #include "50122"
'popraw dane #include "50609"
dim g_pCardBuilder : set g_pCardBuilder = nothing
function fopen set g_pCardBuilder = new CCardBuilder
g_pCardBuilder.prepare_framework page_.topelement,false,true,false
build_menu rebuild_contents
fopen = true end function
'called once to build menu sub build_menu 'dodajemy menu items with g_pCardBuilder.menu
.add_item "Popraw dane","varFunction=""popraw_dane""" .add_item_pic "Wyślij rozwiązanie","varFunction=""send_email_on_problem"" ", PICTURE_SMALL_EMAIL
end with end sub
sub rebuild_contents dim pPlugFactory : set pPlugFactory = doc_.getmodule(60176) with g_pCardBuilder .reset_framework
dim info
info =" Status: " + enum2str(TYPEID_N5BWINFO, ENUMFLDNR_N5BWINFO_STATUS, page_.root.eStatus)
'tool pane .toolpane.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = cstr(info)
'title .title = page_.root.strTytul
pPlugFactory.plug_problem_podstawowe .new_section(.fixedpane, "Informacje podstawowe"), page_.root.idobj pPlugFactory.plug_problem_rozwiazanie .new_section(.fixedpane, "Rozwiązanie"), page_.root.idobj
end with end sub
function fclose set g_pCardBuilder = nothing end function
function frefresh rebuild_contents end function
function send_email_on_problem() if page_.root.eStatus <> N5BWINFO_STATUS_ZAMKNIETY then MessageBox "Aby wysłać rozwiązanie problem musi być zamknięty.", "Karta problemu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if doc_.getmodule(60163).send_email_on_problem(page_.root) end function
